summary: A Go-based orchestration runner with MCP integration focused on assertion validation and schema management.
concerns: high volume of agent-generated extra test files indicates possible flakiness or coverage gaps
recent fix for 12 missing assertion types suggests schema drift between implementation and exported definitions
scattered test directories across GOrchestra worktrees may lead to merge conflicts or stale tests
suggestions: consolidate extra tests into the main test suites to reduce file proliferation
add schema contract tests to prevent future assertion type drift
review MCP handler error paths for robustness
